title: Number 1 Balloons Sage Green, 40inch Large 1 Balloon Helium Balloons,Self Inflating Foil Nmber Balloon One Balloon for 1st Birthday Decorations Boys Girls Birthday Anniversary Decorations
features: Sage Green Number 1 Balloon :You will get 1pc 40 inch mylar foil number 1 balloon and 1pc straw. Perfect for 1st 10th 12th 13th 15th 16th 17th 18th 21st birthday or anniversary party decorations supplies.

Durable & Non-Toxic material: Number balloons measures is 40",our number balloon crafted from premium-grade foil materials. strong and durable, not easy to explode and leak, safe for long time, non-toxic and non-odor, durable, can be used safely around childern.Our Number balloons can be reusable repeatedly with self-sealing valve, convenient to inflate and deflate by an air. After party ending, the black and white grid of number balloons will easy to deflate and store for next time use.

Easy to Inflate & Deflate: The Large foil number balloons have self-sealing valve does not need to be knotted for easy inflation and deflation. It can be Inflate with helium or air. To prevent the balloon from bursting, please do not fill too much air into the balloon. Do not press it hard. If you need to empty the balloon, you can use a straw to insert the filling hole and release slowly.

Resuable: Our Sage Green number balloon can be reusable repeatedly with self-sealing valve, convenient to inflate and deflate by an air. After party ending, the black and white grid of number balloons will easy to deflate and store for next time use.

Perfect Party Decotation: These foil number balloons is suitable for kids or adult birthday party decoration, baby shower, grandparents' birthday, mum and dad's wedding anniversary, and graduation party design. The elegant Sage Green number mylar foil balloons is a nice prop to form a backdrop and take photos,also perfectly decorate your 1st birthday party or other anniversary events,
